title: EvidenceClientIdentity
description: Structured content extracted from a client identity verification document. Supports KYC/AML requirements under the Money Laundering Regulations 2017.

itemId.description: Service-assigned unique identifier for this evidence item within the index.

documentType.description: Category of primary identity document presented.

documentNumber.description: Redacted or tokenised document reference number (e.g. passport number). Must not store full number in plain text.

issuingCountry.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the issuing authority.

documentExpiryDate.description: Expiry date of the identity document (ISO 8601 date). Null for documents without expiry (e.g. birth certificate).

verificationMethod.description: Method used to verify the document (in-person, certified copy, electronic check, or synchronous video).

electronicVerificationRef.description: Reference number from electronic verification provider (e.g. Experian, Onfido). Present when verificationMethod=ELECTRONIC_VERIFICATION.

addressVerification.description: Proof-of-address details, if captured alongside identity.

verifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the address document was verified.

documentDate.description: Issue date on the address document. Must be within 3 months for most document types.

pepSanctionsCheck.description: Politically Exposed Person and sanctions screening result.

providerRef.description: Reference from the screening provider (e.g. Dow Jones, LexisNexis).
